title: Close out KooshaPari/apps orphan repo — 100% redundant, deletion executed, closure push to canonical home
author: KooshaPari (manager-task)
device_rationale: Pure governance/orchestration: byte-level audit (read-only), GH REST API + curl sha256 (no builds), STATUS.md refresh (markdown), push WIP branch via existing SSH push_key. No cargo, no iOS sim, no Docker-in-Docker, no >10min build cycles. Fits ADR-023 Rule 1 (macbook-allowed work).
device_gate_self_check: Rule 1 PASS / Rule 2 N/A / Rule 3 PASS (audit + STATUS refresh are macbook-runnable; local apps/ prune is deferred to a future session and explicitly excluded from this task)
audit_method: gh api (GitHub REST) + curl raw URL sha256 + find/du/stat local inspection
follow_ups_closed: Confirmed KooshaPari/apps is a 100% redundant orphan via byte-level sha256 cross-check against KooshaPari/phenotype-apps (Subagent A audit)
Confirmed GitHub-side deletion of KooshaPari/apps per worklogs/2026-06-20-round-2-absorption-sweep.json (HTTP 404 verified 2026-06-20)
Confirmed CODEOWNERS file in apps is byte-identical to phenotype-apps/apps/.github/CODEOWNERS (sha256 7fdfc1c5cb33eadeeafdcd64b0713ac6a7c2b0bc19edfbc7c3b02a88c746a38f)
Confirmed apps/.gitignore is generic cross-platform build-ignore boilerplate (no app-specific path, no PII, no secret pattern, recoverable from any template)
Refreshed STATUS.md for 2026-06-20 v11 closure + L7-007 apps-orphan closure (345 lines, supersedes 2026-06-18 21:00 PDT v8-launch version)
Created this L7-007 worklog per ADR-015 v2.1 schema (with device: field per ADR-025/030 bump)
Added L7-007 row to STATUS.md app-level repo triage table (KooshaPari/apps bucket: DELETED 2026-06-20)

subagent_5_actions_this_turn.rationale: Pure governance task: STATUS.md refresh + worklog update + git commit + git push. No builds. ADR-023 Rule 1 PASS.

open_follow_ups.description: Local /Users/kooshapari/CodeProjects/Phenotype/repos/apps/ prune + delete (3.1 GB on disk): rm -rf ios/FocalPoint/.build/ + 6 build*/ dirs (recovers 2.97 GB); rm -rf web/ (120 KB, identical to phenotype-apps/apps/web/public/); then PRESERVE the 1.8 MB iOS source per audit Option A (push to phenotype-apps:wip/2026-06-20-focalpoint-ios-source branch) or Option B (copy to repos/findings/2026-06-20-focalpoint-ios-source-orphan/ for local safekeeping per ADR-023 paused-app policy). After preservation, rm -rf /repos/apps/.
open_follow_ups.status: deferred; explicitly out of scope for this manager task (would require user decision on Option A vs B; both are safe). Non-blocking for L7-007 closure.
open_follow_ups.blocker: User decision required on Option A (push to phenotype-apps) vs Option B (local findings/)

open_follow_ups.description: Add L7-007 row to docs/adr/INDEX.md closure cross-reference table for symmetry with the other 4 closed ADRs (ADR-031, 033, 034, 036). Note: L7-007 is a task closure, not an ADR closure — but recording it in the closure table provides symmetry and discoverability for future sessions.

Update STATUS.md 'App-level repo triage' row for KooshaPari/apps from 'DELETED' to 'n/a (orphaned; absorbed into phenotype-apps)' once local prune + delete completes (FU1). The current row explicitly notes local state is pending.

notable_findings: Audit doc /private/tmp/subagent-a-apps-orphan-audit.md (Subagent A, 360 lines) is the canonical reference for this closure. All claims in this worklog are sourced from there.

apps remote was 6 KB on disk per GitHub vs phenotype-apps at 875 MB — 5 orders of magnitude smaller. The apps repo was created 2026-06-18T06:31:53Z (48 min AFTER phenotype-apps), confirming it was an afterthought / accidental duplicate.
1 of 2 files in apps (.github/CODEOWNERS, 139 B) is byte-identical to phenotype-apps/apps/.github/CODEOWNERS (verified via curl raw URL sha256 + base64-decoded gh api content).

The other file (.gitignore, 234 B) is generic cross-platform build-ignore boilerplate. Its content excludes /ios/, /web/, /android/ — confirming the repo was *designed* to never track app source. The .gitignore itself is a governance marker, not app content.

Deletion of KooshaPari/apps was executed by gh token 'KooshaPari' (active since 2026-06-15 18:40 PDT, token scopes include 'delete_repo') per worklogs/2026-06-20-round-2-absorption-sweep.json. HTTP 404 confirmed 2026-06-20 via `gh repo view KooshaPari/apps` returning `GraphQL: Could not resolve to a Repository with the name 'KooshaPari/apps'. (repository)`.

Round-2 absorption sweep also DELETED 3 other 0 KB repos (pheno-otel-wt, PhenotypeHandoff, pheno-secret-scan — all v11-auto-created and empty) and ARCHIVED 4 (pheno-capacity, DataKit, dagctl, phenotype-gateway). Net fleet state: 89 → 82 active (-7), 45 → 49 archived (+4), 8 → 12 deleted (+4).

Local /Users/kooshapari/CodeProjects/Phenotype/repos/apps/ has 3.1 GB on disk: 2.97 GB is Xcode build artifacts (regeneratable), 1.8 MB is real iOS source (preservation decision needed per FU1), 120 KB is web assets (identical to phenotype-apps, safe to drop), ~3 KB is committed.
No secrets found in any local or remote file (greps for BEGIN PRIVATE KEY, ghp_, sk-, xox[bp]-, AKIA*, .env*, *.key, *.pem, *.p12, *.keystore, id_rsa*, *.mobileconfig all returned empty).

The 'apps' repo's stated purpose ('monorepo for app-level repos (web UI, services)') is already served by phenotype-apps, per its description: 'Phenotype apps — iOS + web shell assets (apps/ subdir of meta-repo extracted to its own home, per ADR-023 app-policy: apps are self-repod)'.

AGENTS.md active wave header at line 3 was 'v11 — current' before this task (refreshed T0.5.6 in worklogs/2026-06-20-v11-session-wrap-orchestrator.json); this L7-007 task is part of the v11 closure sweep, not a separate wave.

summary: L7-007 apps-orphan closure COMPLETE. KooshaPari/apps confirmed as 100% redundant orphan by Subagent A's 360-line byte-level audit (/private/tmp/subagent-a-apps-orphan-audit.md): 2 files / 373 B remote content (1 byte-identical to phenotype-apps, 1 generic boilerplate). Deletion executed 2026-06-20 per round-2 absorption sweep (apps action: delete, rationale: '6KB placeholder repo containing only .github/ and .gitignore. Empty scaffold; content lives in phenotype-apps.'). HTTP 404 confirmed 2026-06-20 via gh repo view. STATUS.md refreshed for v11 closure + this closure (345 lines, supersedes 2026-06-18 21:00 PDT version).
